title: Execution Context Drift Exceeds Preservation Threshold
scenario: A clinical execution context changes gradually until it no longer remains sufficiently preserved for execution.
initial_state: The execution context was preserved during authorization.
state_transition: Context drift accumulates beyond the preservation threshold.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires the clinical context to remain sufficiently preserved through time.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because context drift exceeds the preservation threshold.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when execution-context drift breaks integrity preservation.
clinical_action: Execute treatment under drifted clinical context
